features.description: eSIM profile download, installation, management, and switching

features.description: NFC contactless interface - APDU routing, HCE, secure element access

features.name: Java Card Runtime
features.description: Java Card runtime environment - applet installation, execution, crypto APIs

features.name: USIM Application
features.description: USIM application - authentication, key agreement, EF management

features.name: PKI Certificate
features.description: PKI certificate management - generation, storage, verification on card

features.name: Secure Messaging
features.description: Secure messaging protocols - SCP02, SCP03, MAC and encryption
